NTN No:{% if sup.tax_id %} {{sup.tax_id}} {% endif %} 		{{doc.company}}

ITEM # Description # Quantity Unit Price Total

Total Amount {{"{:,.2f}".format(doc.total)}}

Other Comments Or Special Instructions
